open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] fix: l_map_put update rejected at >=75% load + edge-case tests

notes: No human-authored issues. PRs #98 and #99 merged by maintainer. This run: fixed l_map_put bug (load-factor check blocked updates to existing keys at >=75% capacity; also fixed tombstone-full-map insertion gap), added test_map_high_load and test_str_split_edge_cases. Next: word-at-a-time l_strcmp, buffered I/O helpers.
